metadata.description: XOLoop — subagent-driven code improvement framework for Claude Code. 11 modes: build, simplify, polish, fuzz, benchmark, improve, autoresearch, audit, docs, overnight, finalize.

plugins.name: xoloop
plugins.description: Subagent-driven code improvement (no API key required). 11 modes: TDD build, deletion-focused simplify (metric-gated: sloc/cyclomatic/exports must decrease), tournament-based polish, property-based fuzz, SHA-256-locked benchmarks + METRIC script contract, benchmark-driven improve with MAD-based confidence, codex+Opus audit loop, Champion-vs-Challenger autoresearch, doc-generation (scan + generate + polish + polish), overnight orchestrator (11-phase, 80-budget), and finalize (splits noisy runs into reviewable PRs). Session persistence across context resets via .xoloop/session.md + session.jsonl. Atomic patch apply with TOCTOU-free symlink protection.
